sourceMovie.title: Last Night in Soho
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Last Night in Soho works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Last Night in Soho clicked for you, It Follows (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Last Night in Soho?
faq.answer: Try It Follows, Suspiria, The Midnight Meat Train—each shares DNA with Last Night in Soho while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Last Night in Soho?
faq.answer: Last Night in Soho (2021) is best described as Horror, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Last Night in Soho worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
